# Golden case: 0352300080626000109

This fixture records source truth from the real read-only getDocsIP run, not
from the application report. Binary sources are intentionally excluded. Their
hashes and stable local recovery paths are in `source_inventory.yaml`.

The procurement is a services procurement: vehicle diagnostics, maintenance and
current repair. The NMCK document is a unit-price list; it does not establish a
fixed volume for every service. Values in this fixture remain candidate truth
until a human reviewer accepts them.
